mapper.sql: select service_id, park_id, service_name, service_type, service_desc, required_materials, service_flow, charge_standard, time_limit, status, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from biz_property_service
mapper.select: order by sort_order asc, service_id desc
order by sort_order asc, service_id desc
